note: Aliases: image, img. 'src' (alias 'path') required. Source resolved by ImageSource — file path, URL, data-URI, raw bytes.

id.description: cNvPr picture id; @id in /picture[@id=ID]. add honors a caller-supplied id so dump-replay keeps it stable for spTgt animation refs; immutable after creation.

mediaType.description: logical media kind derived from VideoFromFile / AudioFromFile presence under the picture. One of `picture`, `video`, `audio`. Surfaces only via the `image`/`video`/`audio`/`media` selectors.

x.description: x offset in EMU/length form (e.g. 2cm). pptx absolute positioning.

y.description: y offset in EMU/length form (e.g. 2cm). pptx absolute positioning.

width.description: width — EMU/length form (e.g. 1.5cm). Required if not inferred from native ratio.

height.description: height — EMU/length form (e.g. 1.5cm). Required if not inferred from native ratio.

rotation.description: clockwise rotation in degrees. Mirrors shape/connector/group rotation — stored on the same a:xfrm rot attribute (degrees * 60000). Alias: rotate.

link.description: click-hyperlink target attached to the picture's cNvPr (so the whole image is clickable). Accepts absolute URI (https://, mailto:), slide[N] for in-deck jumps, or named actions (firstslide, lastslide, nextslide, previousslide). Pass 'none' or empty to clear.

tooltip.description: hover tooltip text for the click-hyperlink. Applied together with `link` in a single set/add call; standalone tooltip change without link is not supported.

brightness.description: luminance offset in [-100, 100]. Stored on the blip as a:lumOff (value * 1000). Combine with `contrast` to mirror PowerPoint's Picture Format → Corrections.

contrast.description: luminance modulation in [-100, 100]. Stored on the blip as a:lumMod (100000 + value * 1000). Combine with `brightness`.

shadow.description: outer shadow as `color-blur-angle-dist-opacity` (mirrors shape `shadow`). color is hex (no `#`) or scheme; blur/dist in points; angle in degrees; opacity 0-100.

glow.description: outer glow as `color-radius-opacity` (mirrors shape `glow`). color is hex (no `#`) or scheme; radius in points; opacity 0-100.

compressionState.description: blip compression target (a:blip cstate attribute). PowerPoint's Picture Format → Compress Pictures → target use. Accepted values: email, print, hqprint, screen, none. `none` (the schema default) is suppressed on readback.
